creator: david.marec@proton.me
text:
Correct.

* openssl from base:
  * FreeBSD11-4 RELEASE: BROKEN
  * FreeBSD12-2-RELEASE: OK
  * FreeBSD13-0-RELEASE: OK

openssl from port:
  * FreeBSD11-4 RELEASE: OK
  * FreeBSD12-2-RELEASE: OK
  * FreeBSD13-0-RELEASE: OK

libressl from port:
- unset "TLS_SRP" from ftp/curl to make this one build -
  * FreeBSD11-4 RELEASE: OK
  * FreeBSD12-2-RELEASE: OK
  * FreeBSD13-0-RELEASE: OK

{openssl | libressl}-dev ports: not checked.
